---
name: Bug report
about: Report a runtime, packaging, or DX problem
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Reproduction

1. Environment
2. Module configuration
3. Request or page flow
4. Actual result

## Expected result

What should have happened instead.

## Logs

Include relevant server logs, stack traces, or build errors.

## Extra context

Package manager, Node version, Nuxt version, OS, and model configuration.
